All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AtomicWrapperValue<T>
An atomic WrapperValue variant.
BooleanSerializer
Minecraft serializer for boolean to FriendlyByteBuf
FriendlyByteBufSerializer<T>
Minecraft serializer for FriendlyByteBuf
SerializationUtils
A utility class for serialization.
Serializer<S,D>
A serializer for a specific source and destination type.
Value<T>
A Value is the core of the value system, which provides a way to observe and change values.
Value.Listener<T>
A listener for value changes.
ValueGroup
A ValueGroup is a group of values that can be observed and changed.
ValueSerializer<S,D>
A serializer wrapper for values.
WrapperValue<T>
A Value implementation.
